creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Hello,

Please look at the developers handbook
(http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html)
to get a kernel backtrace etc from the dump you have. We need to know
where we are looking at. The symptoms you are describing are not seen by
me, and I have a geom_mirror running on my production colocated webserver
(moderatly loaded).

Thanks,
Remko


-- 
/"\   Best regards,                      | remko@FreeBSD.org
